section.div: Claude Code skill/plugin: immersive scroll-scrubbed 'fly through the world' landing pages generated with Higgsfield (Emons-style diorama flights, seamless connectors, portable scrub engine).
agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
Let Claude (or any LLM) actually watch a video — scene-aware, deduplicated frames + transcript, from a URL or local file. Runs locally, MIT.
